identification.title: LSMS-ISA Harmonised Dataset on Agricultural Productivity and Welfare in Sub-Saharan Africa
identification.geography: Ethiopia, Malawi, Mali, Niger, Nigeria, Tanzania, Uganda

consent.consent_scope: Household and plot-level surveys; informed consent obtained by national statistical offices (NSOs) per country protocols; data harmonized by World Bank LSMS-ISA.
consent.consent_language: Local languages per country (e.g. Amharic, Chichewa, Hausa)

permitted_use.use_restrictions: Microdata access via World Bank Microdata Library; registration and terms apply. Research and policy use; no redistribution of microdata; cite country NSOs and World Bank.

provenance.collector_org: World Bank LSMS-ISA; national statistical offices (Ethiopia, Malawi, Mali, Niger, Nigeria, Tanzania, Uganda)

audit.notes: Governance record filled for DSA 2026 workshop application. Source: Zenodo, Nature Sci Data 2025. Household/plot-level; consent and terms documented by World Bank and country NSOs.
